_comment: Mission-console-only hooks, attached at launch via `claude --settings`. Loaded ADDITIVELY (it merges with normal user/project settings, it does not replace them). Wired by console-session.sh (ops), console-session-wt.sh -> claude-miss (dev), and scripts/claude-miss-integrator (integrator, when given its mission name), so it never affects the operator's own Claude sessions. Doc-update nudges, all driven by $MISSION_* abs paths the launch scripts export: (1) UserPromptSubmit -> $MISSION_DOC_REMINDER, time-based, nudges when LOG.md goes stale during active work. (2) Event-based 'update docs after a commit/integrate/release/deploy' is a TWO-part hook because the model refuses instructions injected via a PostToolUse additionalContext (treats them as an untrusted injection): PostToolUse(Bash) -> $MISSION_DOC_POSTACTION silently RECORDS the milestone to a marker file, and Stop -> $MISSION_DOC_STOP reads it at end-of-turn and blocks the stop with a reason (the trusted channel) so the model logs the milestone before finishing. The Stop hook is one-shot per milestone + stop_hook_active-guarded, so it can't loop.
